CustomField.description: The value for the target field, it can be static value or merge field e.g., {reduivy__Field_A__c} - {reduivy__Field_B__c}
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The value for the target field, it can be static value or merge field e.g., {reduivy__Field_A__c} - {reduivy__Field_B__c}
CustomField.label: Value
